allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Total events:', d.get\('meta',{}\).get\('count','?'\)\) ev = d.get\('data',[]\) if ev: e=ev[0] print\('Sample name:', e.get\('name',{}\).get\('fi','?'\)\) print\('Has location:', bool\(e.get\('location',{}\).get\('position'\)\)\) print\('Keywords:', [k.get\('@id',''\) for k in e.get\('keywords',[]\)[:3]]\) ")
